data.content:
Finance Law
The finance law is the legal basis for licensing the state budget.

State Expenditures
State expenditures are part of the state budget.

Tax Revenues
Tax revenues are the primary source of state resources.

State Budget
The state budget consists of state expenditures and resources, licensed under the finance law.

Tasks
Tasks are one of the allocations of budget credits.

State Resources
State resources are part of the state budget, composed of tax revenues.

Programs
Programs are one of the allocations of budget credits.

Budget Credits
Budget credits can be allocated for programs or tasks.
